base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mega_man_disassembled_set — a character (playable) from 1987 mega man. Disassembled 'beta' sprite — unused early-Rock sprites: idle/walk/jump/hurt/stun/face-close-up + shooting + throwing + super-arm variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
